title: Locusts / paperRain
collaboration: Interactive installation in collaboration with George Van Dam and "Various Artists"
description:
Dedicated Audio-Video player developed in MaxMSP-Jitter
                            / Interpretation of the output of 8 music boxes via piezos microphones
                            / Interactive playback of an "explosive video sequence" and a quadraphonic soundtrack
longDescription:
Dedicated Audio-Video player developed in MaxMSP-Jitter
                            / Interpretation of the output of 8 music boxes via piezos microphones
                            / Interactive playback of an "explosive video sequence" and a quadraphonic soundtrack
